title: COMMUNITY SUPPORTED AGRICULTURE - 211info
text: ZENGER FARM COMMUNITY SUPPORTED AGRICULTURE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides members with a weekly box of farm fresh vegetables. 11741 SE Foster Road Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thursday 4pm-6pm Email (503) 282-4245 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (503) 282-4245 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: Sliding scale based on income; SNAP benefits accepted DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Community Supported Agriculture Community Supported Agriculture * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - ADULT AND YOUTH EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
